requirement_topic.en: FSM State-Utility Grid Interconnection — 120/240 V, 60 Hz NEMA-System Revalidation
requirement_topic.zh: FSM州公用事业并网——120/240 V、60 Hz NEMA体系重新验证
requirement_topic.zht: FSM州公共事業併網——120/240 V、60 Hz NEMA體系重新驗證

summary.en: Solar PV inverters connected in FSM should be configured for a US-aligned low-voltage grid, commonly 120/240 V at 60 Hz, and must pass state utility interconnection review. Because the target market is 60 Hz, inverter evidence is typically requested against IEEE 1547 and UL 1741 expectations for anti-islanding, voltage/frequency behavior, and grid-support functions. EN 50549 or EU-style evidence is not the baseline in FSM unless the project owner explicitly requires it.
summary.zh: FSM并网光伏逆变器应按美国沿袭的低压电网配置，常见为120/240 V、60 Hz，并通过州公用事业并网审查。目标市场为60 Hz，项目通常要求按IEEE 1547和UL 1741审查防孤岛、压频行为及电网支持功能。除非项目业主明确要求，EN 50549或欧洲式证据不是FSM基准。
summary.zht: FSM併網光伏逆變器應按美國延續的低壓電網配置，常見為120/240 V、60 Hz，並通過州公共事業併網審查。目標市場為60 Hz，項目通常要求依IEEE 1547和UL 1741審查防孤島、電壓/頻率行為及電網支持功能。除非項目業主明確要求，EN 50549或歐洲式證據並非FSM基準。

standards_or_laws: Pohnpei Utilities Corporation — utility interconnection technical requirements for customer projects
Chuuk Public Utility Corporation — utility interconnection technical requirements for customer projects
IEEE 1547 — Standard for Interconnection and Interoperability of Distributed Energy Resources with Associated Electric Power Systems Interfaces
UL 1741 — Inverters, Converters, Controllers and Interconnection System Equipment for Use With Distributed Energy Resources

summary.en: Chinese grid-connection requirements for inverters are commonly documented through GB/T 37408-2021, NB/T 32004, and GB/T 19964-2024, developed for China’s 50 Hz / 220-380 V conditions. FSM requires explicit reconfiguration and acceptance for 120/240 V, 60 Hz operation.
summary.zh: 中国逆变器并网要求通常通过GB/T 37408-2021、NB/T 32004和GB/T 19964-2024形成，建立在中国50 Hz/220-380 V条件下。FSM要求对120/240 V、60 Hz运行进行明确重构并获批准。
summary.zht: 中國逆變器併網要求通常透過GB/T 37408-2021、NB/T 32004和GB/T 19964-2024形成，建立於中國50 Hz/220-380 V條件下。FSM要求對120/240 V、60 Hz運行進行明確重構並獲批准。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 37408-2021 — 光伏并网逆变器技术要求 (Technical Requirements for Photovoltaic Grid-Connected Inverters)
NB/T 32004 — 光伏并网逆变器技术规范 (Technical Specification for Photovoltaic Grid-Connected Inverters)
GB/T 19964-2024 — 光伏发电站接入电力系统技术规定

gap.en: Critical gap: dual mismatch — frequency and voltage differ. China 50 Hz / 220–380 V evidence does not prove FSM 60 Hz interconnection compatibility. Exporters should verify per target state utility whether anti-islanding, ride-through, reconnection, and protective relay settings must be rebuilt for 60 Hz and 120/240 V and whether inverter firmware is split-phase compatible.
gap.zh: 关键差距：频率和电压双重不匹配。中国50 Hz/220-380 V证据不能证明FSM 60 Hz并网兼容性。出口商应按目标州公用事业确认防孤岛、穿越、重连和保护继电器设定是否需按60 Hz与120/240 V重建，并确认逆变器固件是否兼容分相接口。
gap.zht: 關鍵差距：頻率和電壓雙重不匹配。中國50 Hz/220-380 V證據不能證明FSM 60 Hz併網兼容性。出口商應按目標州公共事業確認防孤島、穿越、重連及保護繼電器設定是否需依60 Hz與120/240 V重建，並確認逆變器韌體是否兼容分相接口。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory in practice for FSM grid-connection projects; project-specific interconnection evidence is required by state utility and DRD filing
mandatory_status.cn: China domestic grid-connection evidence is not directly transferable

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Validate FSM BESS-style operation as a 60 Hz state-utility interconnection process. Revalidate Chinese GB/T evidence against 120/240 V 60 Hz requirements before any submission, and confirm anti-islanding and protection settings with DRD and the receiving state utility.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 将FSM视为60 Hz州级公用事业并网流程，并在提交前将中国GB/T证据重新验证为120/240 V 60 Hz要求；并与DRD及目标州公用事业确认防孤岛和保护设置。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 將FSM視為60 Hz州級公共事業併網流程，並在提交前將中國GB/T證據重新驗證為120/240 V 60 Hz要求；並與DRD及目標州公共事業確認防孤島與保護設定。

requirement_topic.en: Regulatory and Project-Gate Review — DRD Context, State Utilities, and Island Conditions
requirement_topic.zh: 监管与项目门槛审查——DRD背景、州公用事业与岛屿条件
requirement_topic.zht: 監管與項目門檻審查——DRD背景、州公共事業與島嶼條件

summary.en: FSM electricity-sector oversight is shaped through the Department of Resources and Development and state utility companies rather than a single central regulator. Project acceptance therefore may include utility interconnection, local electrical inspection practices, DRD filing, insurer or financier requirements, and hurricane-aware installation expectations. Since this is a state-governed market, requirements can differ between Pohnpei and Chuuk project jurisdictions.
summary.zh: FSM电力行业监管通过国家资源与发展部与州公用事业公司共同形成，而非单一中央监管机构。项目验收可能包含并网、地方电气检查、DRD报备、保险/融资要求以及耐飓风安装要求。由于为州级治理市场，波奈佩与楚克等州在具体要求上可能有差异。
summary.zht: FSM電力行業監管透過國家資源與發展部與州公共事業公司共同形成，而非單一中央監管機構。項目驗收可能包含併網、地方電氣檢查、DRD報備、保險/融資要求及耐颶風安裝要求。由於為州級治理市場，波奈佩與楚克等州在具體要求上可能有差異。

standards_or_laws: Department of Resources and Development (DRD) — national energy and infrastructure policy coordination
Pohnpei Utilities Corporation — state utility interconnection requirements
Chuuk Public Utility Corporation — state utility interconnection requirements
Project-owner, insurer, and local authority requirements for FSM island installation resilience

summary.en: China domestic PV inverter packages are often centered on factory and CNAS tests, CQC/CGC pathways, and China grid-code compatibility. These are not sufficient for FSM state utility project gates that are influenced by DRD filing and US-aligned project resilience practice.
summary.zh: 中国国内光伏逆变器文件多以工厂试验、CNAS测试、CQC/CGC路径和中国并网兼容性为核心。对受DRD报备及美国体系韧性实践影响的FSM州级项目门槛而言，这些不足以单独满足要求。
summary.zht: 中國國內光伏逆變器文件多以工廠試驗、CNAS測試、CQC/CGC路徑和中國並網相容性為核心。對受DRD報備及美國體系韌性實務影響的FSM州級項目門檻而言，這些不足以單獨滿足要求。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 37408-2021 — 光伏并网逆变器技术要求
NB/T 32004 — 光伏并网逆变器技术规范
CQC/CGC voluntary certification schemes for China PV inverter products

gap.en: Gap: Chinese documentation should be supplemented with an FSM project file that identifies DRD filing route, target state utility interconnection requirements, local inspection checkpoints, 60 Hz settings, NEMA-compatible installation details, and hurricane/coastal environmental suitability. Do not rely on a China domestic certificate package as the sole project approval file.
gap.zh: 差距：需以FSM项目文件补充中国文件，明确DRD报备路线、目标州公用事业并网要求、当地检查节点、60 Hz设定、NEMA兼容安装细节、及飓风/沿海环境适应性。不得将中国国内证书包作为唯一项目批准文件。
gap.zht: 差距：需以FSM項目文件補充中國文件，明確DRD報備路線、目標州公共事業併網要求、當地檢查節點、60 Hz設定、NEMA相容安裝細節及颶風/沿海環境適應性。不得將中國國內證書包作為唯一項目批准文件。

mandatory_status.target: Project-dependent but mandatory where state utility, DRD filing, inspector, owner, financier, or insurer acceptance is required before energisation
mandatory_status.cn: China domestic certificate packages are not FSM approval substitutes

source.publisher: Department of Resources and Development (DRD), Federated States of Micronesia

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Build an FSM-specific project file: DRD filing reference, state utility interconnection route, local inspection expectation, and 60 Hz technical controls. Chinese domestic certificates are project-supporting materials only.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 需建立FSM专项项目文件：DRD报备编号、州公用事业并网路径、当地检查预期与60 Hz技术控制项。中国国内证书仅作项目支持材料。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 需建立FSM專項項目文件：DRD報備編號、州公共事業併網路徑、當地檢查預期與60 Hz技術控制項。中國國內證書僅作為項目支持材料。
